inputs.prompt: Film: The Glass House. Format: Feature documentary, 88 min. Logline: A family opens their home to a documentary crew for one year, only to discover the camera changes everything it observes. Production company: Lantern Films. Completion: September 2025. Festival: World premiere CPH:DOX 2026 — main competition. Territories available: All except Scandinavia. Connection: No prior contact. Market: Approaching during EFM.

Film: Roots. Format: Short documentary, 24 min. Logline: A grandmother teaches her grandson to farm. Production company: Oak Tree Pictures. Completion: March 2026. No festival yet. Territories: Worldwide.

Film: Across the Oder. Format: Feature documentary, 92 min. Logline: Two towns on opposite sides of the German-Polish border — same river, same history, completely different memories. Production: German-Polish co-production. Completion: June 2026. Festival: Selected for DOK Leipzig main competition. Awards: Nominated for Best European Documentary, EFA. Territories: All except DACH region.
